name: sync-to-root
description: Apply the code-server / war-room workspace edits DIRECTLY onto the deployed MiOS-DEV root so they go LIVE for testing, with no GitHub round-trip. Use when an agent has changed files in the code-server replica and wants them active on podman-MiOS-DEV immediately. Only works on a mutable MiOS-DEV deploy (an immutable bootc root is refused; those ship via bootc upgrade). Pass mode=check first to preview, then mode=apply. Syncs only git-visible files and never deletes.
